items.definition_en: An all-in-one printer prints, scans, and copies documents.
items.example_en: We bought an all-in-one printer for the new office.

items.definition_en: A wireless mouse connects to a computer without cables.
items.example_en: I prefer a wireless mouse for my laptop.

items.definition_en: A USB hub lets you connect many devices to your computer.
items.example_en: He plugged the keyboard into the USB hub.

items.definition_en: A laser printer uses toner to print fast high-quality pages.
items.example_en: The laser printer is faster than the inkjet printer.

items.definition_en: An external monitor is a separate screen for your computer.
items.example_en: I use an external monitor for better visibility.

items.definition_en: A document shredder cuts paper into small pieces for security.
items.example_en: We use a document shredder for confidential papers.

items.definition_en: A power strip allows several devices to use one power outlet.
items.example_en: The power strip is under the meeting table.

items.definition_en: A surge protector keeps electronic devices safe from voltage spikes.
items.example_en: Plug computers into a surge protector during storms.

items.definition_en: An ergonomic mouse is shaped to reduce wrist strain.
items.example_en: She ordered an ergonomic mouse for her workstation.

items.definition_en: A dual-monitor setup uses two screens at once.
items.example_en: A dual-monitor setup increases work efficiency.

items.definition_en: A touchscreen monitor lets you control things by touching.
items.example_en: The receptionist uses a touchscreen monitor.

items.definition_en: A multifunction device does printing, scanning, and copying.
items.example_en: Our multifunction device scans to email.

items.definition_en: A Bluetooth keyboard connects to devices wirelessly.
items.example_en: He bought a Bluetooth keyboard for his tablet.

items.definition_en: A desktop docking station connects a laptop to many devices.
items.example_en: She leaves her laptop in the docking station at work.

items.definition_en: A conference phone is made for group calls in meetings.
items.example_en: They called the client using the conference phone.

items.definition_en: An uninterruptible power supply gives backup electricity during outages.
items.example_en: The server is always connected to an uninterruptible power supply.

items.definition_en: An all-in-one computer combines the monitor and computer in one unit.
items.example_en: The office uses all-in-one computers to save space.

items.definition_en: A network switch connects multiple computers to one network.
items.example_en: They added a network switch to improve connection speed.

items.definition_en: An interactive display lets people draw or write directly on the screen.
items.example_en: The teacher used the interactive display for her lesson.

items.definition_en: A multifunction remote controls various office technology devices.
items.example_en: She used the multifunction remote to switch the projector source.
